caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters is speaking into a professional condenser microphone. He is seated in a studio setting with a white background featuring a repeating logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" alongside five gold stars. To his right, a black boom arm holds the microphone, and a black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK 101" sits on the table. Behind him, a blue banner displays the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". Across the sequence, the man is engaged in conversation, shifting his gaze and facial expressions while gesturing slightly with his hand. The camera angle remains static, capturing him from the waist up as he speaks, with his expressions evolving from a neutral gaze to a more animated look of engagement.
